vibe: The Architect. Precise, ordered, authoritative, yet approachable. High-end Swiss minimalism.

typography.h1: text-6xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black

layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders: expose the skeleton. Use 1px borders (border-black/10) to separate sections, no shadows, pure flat layouts. Sharp edges.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: 2-column asymmetrical. Left: Massive typography (Name, Role). Right: Sharp rectangular mask with Headshot. Grid lines extending to the edges.
sections.interactions: Reveal animation on text. Very subtle scale on image.

sections.name: About
sections.layout: Editorial text block occupying 8 columns of a 12-column grid. Highlight '12 Years' in massive monospace font.

sections.name: Experience
sections.layout: Data table layout. Rows with 1px top/bottom borders. Columns: Years (Monospace) | Role | Company & details. Hover effect: background turns slightly grey (#F0F0F0).

sections.name: Skills
sections.layout: Bento 'Control Room' Grid. Strict square boxes with 1px borders. Text centered or bottom-left aligned. Minimalist.
components: Grid items for TDM, Agile, Leadership, etc.

sections.name: Projects
sections.layout: Alternating asymmetrical rows. Image on one side, text block on the other. Images use abstract tech photography.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.layout: Massive typography for quotes. Swiss poster style. Author details in monospace below.

sections.name: Contact
sections.layout: Giant 'Let's Talk' text taking up the full width. Simple text links for Email and LinkedIn. No form.

components_customization.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#001D6E]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-black text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white. Use 'data-testid' for all buttons.
components_customization.cards: No standard cards. Use pure divs with 1px border (border-black/10) and p-8. No shadows.
components_customization.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl). Sharp bottom border. Logo left, Links right.

hero_headshot.usage: Hero section portrait. Place inside a strict rectangular container (rounded-none).

project_bg_1.usage: Background or visual for Case Study 1 (Data Migration/Architecture)

project_bg_2.usage: Visual for Case Study 2 (Test Data Management Setup)

motion.global: Subtle, precise. Use Framer Motion for revealing text on scroll (y-axis slide up, opacity). No bouncy animations. Easing should be custom cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for a 'snappy but smooth' feel.

icons: Use 'lucide-react' with crisp stroke-width (1.5). For tech stacks, use 'react-icons'.
instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React portfolio using Tailwind CSS.
Implement the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype. Rely on stark white backgrounds, black text, and precise 1px borders (border-black/10).
Do NOT use standard rounded cards or heavy drop shadows. Everything must be sharp (rounded-none).
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono for dates/tags. Install via Google Fonts or Fontsource.
For the Experience section, avoid standard timelines. Build it like a raw HTML data table or border-collapse grid to emphasize 'Data Management'.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all links, buttons, and navigation items.
Contact section should NOT have a form. Just mailto and linkedin links with massive 'Let's Talk' text.
The hero section should feature the headshot provided in the media section, strictly contained in a sharp rectangle.
No generic gradients. Use the provided abstract images for project cards.
